name: Microwave Never-Fail Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, margarine, milk and marshmallow creme in a 2 quart microwave safe bowl.
2. Cook on high for 3 minutes. Stir well.
3. Continue cooking 2 to 3 minutes more or until the mixture boils. Reduce power to 50%.
4. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Add chocolate chips and shaved baking chocolate. Stir until melted.
6. Pour into a buttered 8-inch dish.
